Container.Name: Uptime Kuma Restly
Container.Overview:
Uptime Kuma Restly is a lightweight Node.js service that exposes the internal Socket.IO API of an existing Uptime Kuma instance as a standard REST API.
This template is for the "Bridge" version (the default distribution). - **WebUI**: Access Swagger UI at [IP]:9911/docs - **Scripts**: Contains tools to verify that the bridge APIs remain in sync with the official Uptime Kuma source. For usage instructions, see the [Development Setup section in the README.md](https://github.com/cansoysal/Uptime-Kuma-Restly#development-setup).
To use the "Combined" version (a single container that bundles Uptime Kuma (v2.2.1) with the bridge), change the Repository value to: ghcr.io/cansoysal/uptime-kuma-restly:latest-combined - **WebUI**: Access Uptime Kuma UI at [IP]:3001
Container.Description: A lightweight REST API bridge for Uptime Kuma. Use the 'latest-combined' tag for a full all-in-one installation.

Config.Name: Bridge API Port
Config.Description: Port for the REST bridge API and Swagger docs.

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Persistent storage for Uptime Kuma data (Used in Combined version).

Config.Name: BRIDGE_HOST
Config.Description: Bridge bind address inside the container.

Config.Name: BRIDGE_PORT
Config.Description: Internal port used by the REST bridge.

Config.Name: BRIDGE_TOKEN
Config.Description: Optional Bearer token required by the REST bridge. Leave blank only for trusted local use.

Config.Name: UPTIME_KUMA_TAG
Config.Description: Base Uptime Kuma tag for the combined image.

Config.Name: KUMA_URL
Config.Description: Base URL of your existing Uptime Kuma instance. (Required for Bridge, defaults to localhost for Combined).

Config.Name: KUMA_USERNAME
Config.Description: Optional Kuma username for automatic bridge login.

Config.Name: KUMA_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Optional Kuma password for automatic bridge login.

Config.Name: KUMA_2FA_SECRET
Config.Description: Optional base32 TOTP secret if the Kuma account uses 2FA.

Config.Name: KUMA_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Socket.IO timeout in seconds for bridge requests to Kuma.
